data.body: Tier E IN PROGRESS (2026-06-13, pushed origin/main @ 3bdf1897). Kickoff lad-cipher-arena (4387-8fae-9c8b-444b). DONE: E0 argparse CLI cutover (cli.py now = rebar._cli, byte-parity help/overview/error via package-data goldens; auto-init/_ensure_initialized middleware ported), E1 entrypoint cutover, E2 all read-ish/quality commands in-process (field-reads, exists/resolve/format, list-descendants, clarity/check-ac/quality/summary) with dual-run parity + library rewired off _run. Pre-existing CI failures fixed (REPO_ROOT leak + macOS tmp-race). 7 commits, full suite 1660 passed. REMAINING: E3 write/lifecycle (+E5c ticket_txn relocation), E4 init/fsck, E5/E5b bridge+reconciler (live-DIG Jira gate), E6 shims, E7 dispatcher delete, E8 suites->pytest, E9 close. Detailed handoff: docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md.
